item.title: USB Hubs Can Save You Lots of Hassles—Here Are 5 We Like Best in 2026
item.description: Ditch the dongles. These multiport USB hubs will maximize your connectivity options.

item.title: Google settles with Epic Games, drops its Play Store commissions to 20%
item.description: Google has dropped its commission, charging a 20% service fee and an optional 5% to use its billing services. It will also offer a new process for thi...

item.title: Which iPhone 17 Model Should You Buy?
item.description: The iPhone 17e is here to fill out Apple’s smartphone lineup. Our primer on the differences and similarities of these iPhones can help you shop.

item.title: His house burned down. He used the insurance money to build PopSockets.
item.description: Does a consumer hardware company need to get on the VC treadmill to succeed? Eleven years and 290 million products sold across 115 countries later, Po...

item.title: Trump’s War on Iran Could Screw Over US Farmers
item.description: The Middle East supplies a huge amount of the world’s fertilizer. Conflict in the region has sent prices soaring ahead of the critical spring planting...
